name: Bookcliff Activity Center
description: Bookcliff Activity Center is a place to play pickleball in Grand Junction, CO. There are 4 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. You can’t reserve the courts.
open_play_schedule: Indoor pickleball play available during November thru March timeframe.  Contact Grand Junction City Parks & Rec department.

name: Chipeta Golf Course
description: Chipeta Golf Course is a place to play pickleball in Grand Junction, CO. There are 8 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Reservations are available. The courts are free. Players have access to food, locker rooms, a pro shop or equipment store, restrooms, trainers or lessons, water, and wheelchair accessibility.

name: Fruita Community Center
description: Fruita Community Center is a place to play pickleball in Fruita, CO. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. The courts can be reserved. Amenities include restrooms.

name: Junction Indoor Tennis Center
description: Junction Indoor Tennis Center is a place to play pickleball in Grand Junction, CO. There are 7 indoor hard courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms and trainers or lessons. A membership is required to play. Reservations are available.

name: Lincoln Park Pickleball Courts
description: Come play pickleball at Lincoln Park Pickleball Courts in Grand Junction, CO! There are 20 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms, water, lights, youth programming, and trainers or lessons. You can reserve the courts.

name: Orr Park Pickleball Courts
description: Orr Park Pickleball Courts is a place to play pickleball in Fruita, CO. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A one-time fee is required to play. Amenities include restrooms.

name: Peach Bowl Park
description: Come play pickleball at Peach Bowl Park in Palisade, CO! There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. You can’t reserve the courts. The courts are free.

name: Pineridge Park
description: 6 Pickleball Courts - 4 permanent, 2 temporary (temporary nets provided at courts)

name: Tom’s courts
description: Tom’s courts is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Appleton, CO. There are 2 outdoor courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are private.
